---
name: Methodology / result challenge
about: Challenge a leaderboard number or the methodology behind it
title: "[challenge] <system> on <benchmark>"
labels: ["challenge", "needs-triage"]
---

<!-- The Neutral Referee disputes cells, it does not delete them. A valid critique maps
     to a methodology VERSION BUMP, not a silent edit. -->

## Which result are you challenging?
- **System:**
- **Benchmark / surface:** (e.g. personalmem_sample, LoCoMo)
- **Run tag:** (from the row's provenance, e.g. `mvp_offline_baselines`)
- **Methodology version shown on the board:**

## What is the claim you dispute?
<!-- e.g. "the displayed token_f1 is wrong", "the scoring rubric mislabels X", ... -->

## Evidence
<!-- Paste logs, a counter-run's results/<tag>.json, links, or the exact reproduce command
     output. The board links the reproduce command + GET /results/<tag>.json for every
     independent row — start there. -->

## Suggested fix
<!-- Optional: a PR with your run config / corrected scorer. We re-run on the pinned harness. -->
